tasks.title: Persist GameRecord to DB at game start (#121)
Persist events incrementally as they happen (#122)

last_completed.key_lesson: Full-stack gap analysis before sprint planning makes task breakdown straightforward; interface-first changes make downstream updates mechanical

sprint_17.items: Site config, Phrase categories, Phrase review

sprint_20.items: Simulation infrastructure (profiles, IsSimulated flags, SIM- IDs)

sprint_22.items: Admin dashboard API, user management, player analytics

sprint_23.items: Games manager API, site config controller

sprint_24.items: Data explorer (simulation summary, player detail, data summary)

sprint_25.items: DB initialization, JSON-to-MySQL migration, admin user seeding

sprint_26.items: Admin frontend (login, dashboard, users, games, config, data explorer)

sprint_27.items: Admin nav link for admin users, roles in auth response/JWT

sprint_28.items: TS build fixes, phrase admin CRUD, user search, role management UI

sprint_29.items: ConfirmDialog, audit log viewer, CSS cleanup, dashboard refresh

sprint_30.items: GameEvent persistence, PlayerStats/PhrasePlayStats recomputation, admin nav roles fix, PhraseUniqueId

sprint_31.items: Consistent adminApi error handling, AdminGuard role check, graceful empty stats, ClueEffectiveness per-game

sprint_32.items: Fix PhraseUniqueId missing column, auto-migrate on startup, model-DB audit

sprint_33.items: Unified auth system, AuthContext, remove dual-token and AdminLogin

sprint_34.items: Backlog drift fix, copilot-instructions updated (User model, data access, backend patterns, 60+ completed items)

sprint_35.items: Context exhaustion prevention (agent efficiency, task tracking, session handoff, context budget)

sprint_36.items: Developer practice gaps (lessons registry L1-L11, pre-commit checklist, test expectations, build enforcement)

sprint_37.items: Growing complexity management (code-architect update, codebase map, complexity budget, simplifier awareness)

sprint_38.items: Admin auth fix (token auto-refresh, roles in UpdateUser response, backlog status cleanup)

sprint_39.items: Reliable game completion persistence (async end-to-end, transactional saves, event-loading queries)
